meta.title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Ori Goshen: Reliability Is the Bottleneck for Agents
meta.description:
AI agents that are doing actual, significant work in enterprises are about as prolific as self-driving cars. Is there something fundamental we're missing when thinking about agents? Or maybe we're expecting too much of them? 

AI21's co-CEO and founder Ori Goshen took an in-depth look into why it's so darn hard to build serious agents today and what might make it less hard to build them tomorrow.

--------------

Join us at AI Dev 26 x San Francisco! Tickets: https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai/
